title: Pokémon League Night
description: Weekly Pokémon TCG league night. Earn league points, trade cards, and play at any skill level. All ages welcome — bring your deck or borrow one in-store.

title: Friday Night Magic
description: The classic FNM. Format rotates week to week — Draft, Standard, Commander, and more. Check our Facebook page or call the store for the current week's format and prize structure.

title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Local Tournament
description: Competitive Yu-Gi-Oh! local in Advanced Format. Swiss rounds with top cut. Earn store credit and prizes. Bring your best legal deck and your game face.

title: Lorcana Locals
description: Disney Lorcana Core Constructed tournament. Build your best deck and compete in Swiss rounds for store prizes. 32-player cap — register online to lock in your spot.
